title: Populating a formula column cell based on the end date of a timeline column cell
excerpt: I would like to create a formula column that will automatically populate based on the end date of the timeline column. Let’s say a project has a timeline of Aug 23 2022 - March 23 2023, the cell in the formula cell would…

posts.author: dawnasks (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create a formula column that will automatically populate based on the end date of the timeline column. Let’s say a project has a timeline of Aug 23 2022 - March 23 2023, the cell in the formula cell would automatically populate to display March 23 2023. Is this possible, and if so, what is the formula? Thank you.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
